![](https://centriconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/shutterstock_1098251483-jpg.webp)
# Accounting & Advisory   
When Your Growth Demands It.
We understand that you want to grow your business and reduce your risks.   
That’s why we offer solutions that can help you achieve your goals and meet your compliance needs.
## Why Choose Centri?
At Centri, we leverage our experience in accounting, finance, and management   
with our knowledge of capital markets to give your business guidance when it matters most.   
Tailored to you, we provide accounting and advisory services designed for any stage of the business lifecycle.
[See Why We Can Help You Succeed](https://centriconsulting.com/one-firm/)
1,000+
Clients Served
Proven record of delivering results and solutions for our customers
85%
NPS Score
Our high client satisfaction score shows our commitment to excellence
2011
Firm Founded
We’ve built our business on entrepreneurial expertise and can help you do the same
## A Calculated Approach To Business Advisory Services
From the technical details to the big-picture strategy — our team can do it all. We provide first-rate business advisory services and accounting solutions rooted in experience and designed to exceed your expectations.
[SEC Financial Reporting & Compliance](https://centriconsulting.com/#expanding-content__sec-financial-reporting-compliance)
[IPO & Capital Markets Readiness](https://centriconsulting.com/#expanding-content__ipo-capital-markets-readiness)
[Technical Accounting](https://centriconsulting.com/#expanding-content__technical-accounting)
[M&A Advisory](https://centriconsulting.com/#expanding-content__ma-advisory)
SEC Financial Reporting & Compliance
Ensure all your reporting is compliant with SEC requirements and aiding the goals of your business.
[See Our Approach to SEC Financial Reporting](https://centriconsulting.com/services/sec-financial-reporting/)
![Business leaders analyzing data and charts.](https://centriconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/SEC-Financial-Reporting-640x284.png)
IPO & Capital Markets Readiness
Set your IPO journey up for success with preparation work that helps you get ready for what’s to come.
[See Our Approach to IPO Readiness](https://centriconsulting.com/services/ipo-readiness/)
![Analyzing financial charts in business and accounting reports.](https://centriconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/IPO-Readiness-1-640x380.webp)
Technical Accounting
Find the support you need to ensure you’re accurately documenting the impact of your deals on your statements.
[See Our Approach to Technical Accounting](https://centriconsulting.com/services/technical-accounting/)
![Auditor team calculating and checking balances.](https://centriconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/Technical-Accounting-640x243.jpeg)
M&A Advisory
Navigate your next transaction in confidence knowing that you have assessed all angles of your next deal.
[See Our Approach to M&A Advisory](https://centriconsulting.com/services/mergers-acquisitions/)
![Business leaders shaking hands after a meeting.](https://centriconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/MA-Advisory-640x284.png)
[Accounting Operations & Transformation](https://centriconsulting.com/#expanding-content__accounting-operations-transformation)
[Tax Advisory](https://centriconsulting.com/#expanding-content__tax-advisory)
[Valuation](https://centriconsulting.com/#expanding-content__valuation)
[Risk Advisory](https://centriconsulting.com/#expanding-content__risk-advisory)
Accounting Operations & Transformation
Streamline your accounting processes to meet your current and future needs.
[See Our Approach to Accounting Operations & Transformation](https://centriconsulting.com/services/operational-transformation/)
![Business leaders in a meeting.](https://centriconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/Board-Advisory-640x284.png)
Tax Advisory
Receive guidance in finding the right tax strategy that works for your business, so you can do more.
[See Our Approach to Tax Advisory](https://centriconsulting.com/services/tax-advisory/)
![Business leader typing into a calculator.](https://centriconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/Tax-640x284.png)
Valuation
Receive information that helps you understand and accurately gauge the full value of your business.
[See Our Approach to Valuation](https://centriconsulting.com/services/valuation/)
![Business leaders analyzing data and charts.](https://centriconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/Valuation-640x284.png)
Risk Advisory
Identify risks and find the right strategies to reduce them, so you can continue growing your business.
[See Our Approach to Risk Advisory](https://centriconsulting.com/services/risk-advisory/)
![Two people analyzing market research reports and income statistics.](https://centriconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/Risk-Advisory-640x252.jpeg)
[Outsourced Accounting](https://centriconsulting.com/#expanding-content__outsourced-accounting)
[HR Advisory](https://centriconsulting.com/#expanding-content__hr-advisory)
[CFO Advisory](https://centriconsulting.com/#expanding-content__cfo-advisory)
[Board Advisory](https://centriconsulting.com/#expanding-content__board-advisory)
Outsourced Accounting
Grow your business by allowing us to help your team with accounting matters and strategic financial insights.
[See Our Approach to Outsourced Accounting](https://centriconsulting.com/services/outsourced-accounting/)
![Two business leaders discussing their outsourced accounting projects.](https://centriconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/Outsourced-Accounting-640x278.jpeg)
HR Advisory
Optimize your HR structure to ensure it supports your business and growth goals.
[See Our Approach to HR Advisory](https://centriconsulting.com/services/hr-advisory/)
![Business people negotiating in a boardroom behind closed glass doors.](https://centriconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/HR-Advisory-640x427.jpeg)
CFO Advisory
Empower your leaders to find the support they need in finding the most effective steps forward toward success.
[See Our Approach to CFO Advisory](https://centriconsulting.com/services/cfo-advisory/)
![Two business people talk project strategy at office meeting room.](https://centriconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/MA-Advisory-640x320.jpeg)
Board Advisory
Build a strong corporate governance structure that addresses your needs and risks.
[See Our Approach to Board Advisory](https://centriconsulting.com/services/board-advisory/)
![Two smiling diverse businessmen in an office.](https://centriconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/CFO-Advisory-scaled-e1701274532581-640x268.webp)
![](https://centriconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/shutterstock_1406807105-jpg.webp)
## Industries We Specialize In
Our business consulting has led us to work with businesses of all sizes and structures, both private and public, across a variety of industries. That said, we do specialize in some notably complex and fast-paced ones.

## **Centri Capital Conference**
On **April 14, 2026** , at Nasdaq in New York City, the **Centri Capital Conference** will feature dynamic programming with exclusive presentations from disruptive companies, thought-provoking panels, and structured one-on-one meetings.
[See the Highlights](https://centriconsulting.com/capital-conference/#highlights)
Client Success Stories
The Centri team is highly accountable, takes ownership of projects, and drives engagement from all stakeholders. The team’s deep knowledge and skill in their area of specialization have contributed significantly to effectively solving complex problems.
Investment Operations, Leading FinTech Company 
The Centri team was a value-add for the transaction. Work done in a timely manner and accurate. Team was easily available for discussions and questions.
Managing Director, Life Sciences Private Equity firm 
The Centri team has been a pleasure to partner with on recent M&A transactions (both pre- and post-close services). I really appreciate how flexible the team has been, providing bespoke solutions to our needs and working very efficiently.
Manager of Strategic Finance,

# The fastest way to finance software and hardware
Choose Capchase as your financing partner to close deals faster and increase your earnings. Approve your buyer, configure your offer, and win your deal in minutes.
[Book a call](https://www.capchase.com/demo)
Trusted by over 10,000 vendors & buyers
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2bfd6294531eb547b806e_gradient-1.webp)
### Buyers expect payment options
82% of U.S. companies use financing for equipment and software. If you don’t offer it, you risk losing the deal.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2c0d038469984e1c349d7_image-2.webp)
### Financing is often the roadblock
Clunky, slow, and unreliable processes stall sales. Done right, financing accelerates deals and keeps you in control.
### Capchase makes financing easier
Close high-velocity or high-complexity transactions in minutes, not weeks. Reseller partner approved.
## Experience the Capchase advantage
Embedded vendor financing that delivers faster approvals, easy deal configurations, and real-time deal status–right where you work.
For Sales
### Close more deals at a higher value
Use flexible payment options as a competitive advantage. Whether your customer prefers monthly, quarterly, or extended net terms - give them the choice they want.
[Learn more](https://www.capchase.com/department/sales)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68cc2f18bce12671fa026ec0_laptop-new.webp)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/67b486ac339ddec78540d46d_Card-neww.png)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/67adf0f761a0d053b55105ad_Finance-1.webp)
For Finance
### Get paid upfront without slowing sales
Offer payment flexibility while still getting paid upfront on every deal—including multi-year and reseller deals—eliminating billing headaches and putting an end to chasing payments.
[Learn more](https://www.capchase.com/department/finance)
## Win-win for your business, partners, and customers
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2da91024544ae491cae81_webp.webp)
### Vendors & Manufacturers
Get paid upfront, empower customers with flexible payments, and leave the collections burden to us. Partner channel approved.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2dabce8165ab45ce7b7dd_layout.webp)
### Reseller Partners
Cut closing from weeks to minutes with easy financing, seamless checkout, and faster payouts.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2daef4a17b8835cbdcbc1_buyer.webp)
### Buyers
Allow your customers to optimize their cash flow while still purchasing the tech they need to be successful.
## Everything you need to simplify B2B financing
Use Capchase from within your sales team's daily tools. Create a white-labeled captive financing program. Enjoy a faster, more responsive, and better experience.  

[Learn more](https://www.capchase.com/features)
### Easy deal configuration  

Generate payment options to best fit your deal including term length, payment frequency, net terms, and subsidy—calculating pricing in real-time.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/679b7b12129d16826d688902_PL-visual.svg)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/679b7bc368ed600e8a5ded7f_Vendor-PL.svg)
### Instant buyer qualification
Approve your customers in advance—in just minutes not weeks—so you can offer financing confidently.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68cc1631ae0cd168e0f2e1d5_ui.png)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68cc1631ae0cd168e0f2e1d5_ui.png)
### Captive financing program  

Extending your brand throughout the payments experience, powered and funded by Capchase.
### Embedded in your sales tools
Work directly in Salesforce CRM, receive immediate updates in Slack or Teams, track your buyer’s order completion live.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/679b817a692182130c28f0d8_salseforce.svg)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/679b81d8a97b79c676f60767_hubspot.svg)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c94fb6f3a4dbda90fbca9b_Frame%201171277195.svg)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/679b8251f76bdf24c9375c8d_Code.svg)
